name: Reptile Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Thai curry paste by combining all ingredients in a food processor until smooth. Set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine coconut milk, curry paste, and fish sauce. Heat over low heat until fully incorporated.
3. Cook the rattlesnake, frog legs, snapping turtle meat, and alligator loin meat in water until tender. Drain and set aside.
4. Add the cooked reptile meat to the curry sauce and simmer over low heat until heated through.
5. Divide the curry sauce with reptile meat into four bowls. Add baby vegetables and cilantro.
6. Garnish with black sesame seeds, cucumber salad, and red pepper julienne.
7. Serve with Thai hot sauce on the side.
